name: sentinel-agent-payment-boundary-preflight
description: Inspect payment boundaries and locally prepare an unsubmitted public quote-request draft.
long_description: Three read-only tools run locally without wallet access. Two deterministic preflights inspect inline public documents without executing supplied content or fetching requester-controlled URLs. The third tool prepares a complete but unsubmitted public GitHub quote-request draft for the fixed-scope Agent Payment Boundary Review; it requires one or two explicit public HTTPS source URLs without credentials, query strings, fragments, or non-public hosts, never fetches them, and includes no payment instructions. No tool submits a request, moves funds, authorizes payment, or creates a service entitlement. A complete human-issued written quote is required before any service payment.

tools.name: prepare_agent_payment_boundary_quote_request
tools.description: Prepare a complete but unsubmitted public GitHub quote-request draft for the $49 Agent Payment Boundary Review. Requires one or two explicit public HTTPS URLs without credentials, query strings, fragments, or non-public hosts; no URL fetch, wallet access, request submission, or payment.

tools.name: preflight_agent_payment_boundary
tools.description: Inspect one or two inline public documents using 11 deterministic agent-payment boundary checks. No URL fetch, code execution, wallet access, request submission, or payment.

tools.name: preflight_x402_v2_payment_required
tools.description: Inspect one decoded inline x402 v2 PaymentRequired JSON document using nine deterministic checks under the exact-EVM EIP-3009 Sentinel safety profile. No header decoding, URL fetch, wallet access, signature verification, settlement, receipt verification, or payment.
